step_rationale: Adipokine associated with metabolic/systemic MI risk, not plaque-specific.
mechanism: Adipokine regulating systemic inflammation and metabolic risk in coronary disease progression.

references.title: Novel Protein-Based Biomarkers of Out-of-hospital Sudden Cardiac Death After Myocardial Infarction.
Identification of Adipsin as a Novel Prognostic Biomarker in Patients With Coronary Artery Disease.
references.journal: Journal of the American Heart Association
